name: Error — voucher already redeemed (409)
description: Verify the cartridge handles a double-redeem (retry, webhook redelivery) gracefully at order placement rather than failing the order. Status + errorCode match the documented Redeem Voucher response (HTTP 409, ALREADY_REDEEMED_VOUCHER).

body.message: The voucher is redeemed. Specify a voucher that hasn't redeemed.
